post.description:
Create a new user account

- **email**: Valid email address
- **password**: Password (minimum 8 characters)
- **display_name**: Optional display name for the user

Sign in with email and password

- **email**: User's email address
- **password**: User's password

Note: This endpoint expects the frontend to handle Firebase Auth sign-in
and send the ID token for verification. This is a placeholder for backend-only auth.

Send password reset email

- **email**: User's email address

Verify Firebase ID token and create session

- **token**: Firebase ID token from client

get.description:
Get current authenticated user info

Requires: 
- Authorization header with Bearer token (Firebase ID token)
- X-Session-Token header (session token) - optional but recommended

post.description:
Logout user and revoke session

- **session_token**: Session token to revoke

Create a new workflow

Requires authentication via Bearer token

- **name**: Workflow name (3-100 characters)
- **description**: Optional workflow description
- **canBeListed**: Whether workflow can be publicly listed (default: false)
- **nodes**: Array of workflow nodes
- **edges**: Array of workflow edges
- **variables**: Workflow variables

get.description:
Get all workflows for the authenticated user

Requires authentication via Bearer token

- **page**: Page number (default: 1)
- **page_size**: Items per page (default: 20, max: 100)
- **status**: Filter by status (optional)

Get a specific workflow by ID

Requires authentication via Bearer token
User must own the workflow or it must be public (canBeListed=true)

put.description:
Update a workflow

Requires authentication via Bearer token
User must own the workflow

delete.description:
Delete a workflow

Requires authentication via Bearer token
User must own the workflow

get.description:
Get all public workflows (canBeListed=true)

Does NOT require authentication

post.description:
Create a new template from an existing workflow

**Requires authentication**

Creates a template that can be shared with other users.
The template is created from one of your existing workflows.

get.description:
Search and filter templates

**No authentication required**

Search templates by name, description, tags, category, and difficulty.
Results can be sorted by popularity, rating, newest, or most used.

Get featured templates

**No authentication required**

Returns curated featured templates with high ratings.

Get all templates created by the authenticated user

**Requires authentication**

Get a specific template by ID

**Authentication optional**

Returns template details including whether the current user has bookmarked it
and their rating (if authenticated).

put.description:
Update a template

**Requires authentication**

Only the template author can update it.

schema.title: Response Update Template Api V1 Templates  Template Id  Put

delete.description:
Delete a template (soft delete - marks as inactive)

**Requires authentication**

Only the template author can delete it.

schema.title: Response Delete Template Api V1 Templates  Template Id  Delete

post.description:
Clone a template into your workflows

**Requires authentication**

Creates a new workflow in your account based on the template.

get.description:
Get all template categories

**No authentication required**

post.description:
Rate and review a template

**Requires authentication**

Rate a template from 1 to 5 stars with an optional review.

**No authentication required**
